memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_tg_cb::connected) (struct bt_conn *conn, struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg)
memberdef.name: connected

briefdescription.para: An AVRCP TG connection has been established.

detaileddescription.para: This callback notifies the application of an avrcp connection, i.e., an AVCTP L2CAP connection.

parameterdescription.para: Connection object.
AVRCP TG connection object.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_tg_cb::disconnected) (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg)
memberdef.name: disconnected

briefdescription.para: An AVRCP TG connection has been disconnected.

detaileddescription.para: This callback notifies the application that an avrcp connection has been disconnected.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_tg_cb::unit_info_req) (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid)
memberdef.name: unit_info_req

detaileddescription.para: This callback is called whenever an AVRCP unit info is requested.

parameterdescription.para: The transaction label of the request.
AVRCP TG connection object.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_tg_cb::register_notification) (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, uint8_t event_id, uint32_t interval)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, uint8_t event_id, uint32_t interval)
memberdef.name: register_notification

detaileddescription.para: This callback is called whenever an AVRCP register notification is requested.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the request.
The event ID that the CT wants to register for bt_avrcp_evt_t.
The playback interval for position changed event. other events will have this value set to 0 for ignoring.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_tg_cb::subunit_info_req) (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid)
memberdef.name: subunit_info_req

detaileddescription.para: This callback is called whenever an AVRCP subunit info is requested.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the request.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_tg_cb::get_caps) (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, uint8_t cap_id)
memberdef.name: get_caps

detaileddescription.para: This callback is called whenever an AVRCP get capabilities command is received.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the request.
The capability ID requested.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_tg_cb::browsing_connected) (struct bt_conn *conn, struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg)
memberdef.name: browsing_connected

briefdescription.para: An AVRCP TG browsing connection has been established.

detaileddescription.para: This callback notifies the application of an avrcp browsing connection, i.e., an AVCTP browsing L2CAP connection.

parameterdescription.para: Connection object.
AVRCP TG connection object.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_tg_cb::browsing_disconnected) (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg)
memberdef.name: browsing_disconnected

briefdescription.para: An AVRCP TG browsing connection has been disconnected.

detaileddescription.para: This callback notifies the application that an avrcp browsing connection has been disconnected.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_tg_cb::set_browsed_player) (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, uint16_t player_id)
memberdef.name: set_browsed_player

detaileddescription.para: This callback is called whenever an AVRCP set browsed player request is received.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the request.
The player ID to be set as browsed player.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_tg_cb::get_folder_items) (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: get_folder_items

detaileddescription.para: This callback is called whenever an AVRCP GET_FOLDER_ITEMS request is received from the CT.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the request.

The request buffer containing the Get Folder Items command parameters. The application can parse this payload according to the format defined in bt_avrcp_get_folder_items_cmd. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_tg_cb::change_path) (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: change_path

detaileddescription.para: This callback is called whenever an AVRCP CHANGE_PATH request is received from the CT.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the request.

The request buffer containing the Change Path command parameters. The application can parse this payload according to the format defined in bt_avrcp_change_path_cmd. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_tg_cb::get_item_attrs) (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: get_item_attrs

detaileddescription.para: This callback is called whenever an AVRCP GET_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES request is received from the CT.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the request.

The request buffer containing the Get Item Attributes command parameters. The application can parse this payload according to the format defined in bt_avrcp_get_item_attrs_cmd. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_tg_cb::get_total_number_of_items) (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, uint8_t scope)
memberdef.name: get_total_number_of_items

briefdescription.para: Get Total Number Of Items request callback.

detaileddescription.para: This callback is called whenever an AVRCP GET_TOTAL_NUMBER_OF_ITEMS request is received from the CT.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the request.
The browsing scope for which to get the total number of items. See bt_avrcp_scope_t for valid values.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_tg_cb::search) (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: search

detaileddescription.para: This callback is called whenever an AVRCP SEARCH request is received from the CT.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the request.

The request buffer containing the Search command parameters. The application can parse this payload according to the format defined in bt_avrcp_search_cmd. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_tg_cb::passthrough_req) (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: passthrough_req

detaileddescription.para: This callback is called whenever an AVRCP Pass Through command is request.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the request.

The buffer containing the PASS THROUGH command payload. The application can parse this payload according to the format defined in bt_avrcp_passthrough_rsp. Note that the data is encoded in big-endian format.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_tg_cb::list_player_app_setting_attrs) (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid)
memberdef.name: list_player_app_setting_attrs

detaileddescription.para: Called when the TG receives a vendor dependent command LIST_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_ATTRS.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the command.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_tg_cb::list_player_app_setting_vals) (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, uint8_t attr_id)
memberdef.name: list_player_app_setting_vals

detaileddescription.para: Called when the TG receives a vendor dependent command for LIST_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_VALS.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the command.
Player application setting attribute ID for which the possible values should be listed (e.g., Equalizer, Repeat Mode, Shuffle, Scan).

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_tg_cb::get_curr_player_app_setting_val) (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: get_curr_player_app_setting_val

detaileddescription.para: Called when the TG receives a vendor dependent command GET_CURR_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_VAL.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the command.
The buffer containing the GET_CURR_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_VAL command payload, formatted as bt_avrcp_get_curr_player_app_setting_val_cmd. The application should parse fields in big-endian order.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_tg_cb::set_player_app_setting_val) (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: set_player_app_setting_val

detaileddescription.para: Called when the TG receives a vendor dependent command for SET_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_VAL.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the command.
The buffer containing the SET_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_VAL command payload, formatted as bt_avrcp_set_player_app_setting_val_cmd. The application should parse fields in big-endian order.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_tg_cb::get_player_app_setting_attr_text) (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: get_player_app_setting_attr_text

detaileddescription.para: Called when the TG receives a vendor dependent command GET_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_ATTR_TEXT.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the command.
The buffer containing the GET_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_VAL_TEXT command payload, formatted as bt_avrcp_get_player_app_setting_val_text_cmd. The application should parse fields in big-endian order.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_tg_cb::get_player_app_setting_val_text) (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: get_player_app_setting_val_text

detaileddescription.para: Called when the TG receives a vendor dependent command GET_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_VAL_TEXT.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the command.
The buffer containing the GET_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_VAL_TEXT command payload, formatted as bt_avrcp_get_player_app_setting_val_text_cmd. The application should parse fields in big-endian order.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_tg_cb::inform_displayable_char_set) (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: inform_displayable_char_set

detaileddescription.para: Called when the TG receives a vendor dependent command for INFORM_DISPLAYABLE_CHAR_SET.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the command.
The buffer containing the INFORM_DISPLAYABLE_CHAR_SET command payload, formatted as bt_avrcp_inform_displayable_char_set_cmd. The application should parse fields in big-endian order.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_tg_cb::inform_batt_status_of_ct) (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, uint8_t battery_status)
memberdef.name: inform_batt_status_of_ct

detaileddescription.para: Called when the TG receives a vendor dependent command for INFORM_BATT_STATUS_OF_CT.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the command.
Battery status value bt_avrcp_battery_status_t

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_tg_cb::get_element_attrs) (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: get_element_attrs

detaileddescription.para: Called when the TG receives a vendor dependent command for GET_ELEMENT_ATTRS.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the command.
The buffer containing the GET_ELEMENT_ATTRS command payload, formatted as bt_avrcp_get_element_attrs_cmd. The application should parse fields in big-endian order.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_tg_cb::set_absolute_volume) (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, uint8_t absolute_volume)
memberdef.name: set_absolute_volume

briefdescription.para: Callback function for Set Absolute Volume command (TG).

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Set Absolute Volume command is received from the CT.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the command.
The absolute volume value (0x00-0x7F).

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_tg_cb::get_play_status) (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid)
memberdef.name: get_play_status

detaileddescription.para: Called when the TG receives a vendor dependent command for GET_PLAY_STATUS.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the command.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_tg_cb::set_addressed_player) (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, uint16_t player_id)
memberdef.name: set_addressed_player

detaileddescription.para: Called when the TG receives a vendor dependent command for SET_ADDRESSED_PLAYER.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the command.
The player ID to be set as addressed player.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_tg_cb::play_item) (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: play_item

detaileddescription.para: Called when the TG receives a vendor dependent command for PLAY_ITEM.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the command.
The buffer containing the PLAY_ITEM command payload, formatted as bt_avrcp_play_item_cmd. The application should parse fields in big-endian order.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_tg_cb::add_to_now_playing) (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: add_to_now_playing

detaileddescription.para: Called when the TG receives a vendor dependent command for ADD_TO_NOW_PLAYING.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the command.
The buffer containing the ADD_TO_NOW_PLAYING command payload, formatted as bt_avrcp_add_to_now_playing_cmd. The application should parse fields in big-endian order.
